description: Curated demo subset for the zero-spend temporal R1 bracketing-CI re-analysis. 100 per-query records (stratified, evenly spaced) drawn from the 600-record per_query_records_temporal.json (art_OETjJkketEVS, built by a $0 cached re-run). Each record holds, per method (modeA/naive/raw/pot/sc), whether it answered, its prediction, correctness, and confidence -- the only inputs the R1 bootstrap needs. H1_matched_coverage_published holds the FULL-600 published point gaps + (buggy) CIs for side-by-side reference.
